testcase.classname: WorkersService should be defined

testcase.classname: WorkersService findAllWorkers should return paginated data with count
testcase.name: WorkersService findAllWorkers should return paginated data with count

testcase.classname: WorkersService findAllWorkers should return data without pagination if no page and limit are provided
testcase.name: WorkersService findAllWorkers should return data without pagination if no page and limit are provided

testcase.classname: WorkersService findAllWorkers should return an empty result when no workers are found
testcase.name: WorkersService findAllWorkers should return an empty result when no workers are found

testcase.classname: WorkersService findAllWorkers should handle repository errors
testcase.name: WorkersService findAllWorkers should handle repository errors

testcase.classname: WorkersService findAllWorkers should return paginated data with count for job run id

testcase.classname: WorkersService should update worker status based on health status
testcase.name: WorkersService should update worker status based on health status

testcase.classname: WorkersService updateWorkerJobRunStatus should update isActive and save when mapping exists
testcase.name: WorkersService updateWorkerJobRunStatus should update isActive and save when mapping exists

testcase.classname: WorkersService updateWorkerJobRunStatus should throw BadRequestException if mapping does not exist
testcase.name: WorkersService updateWorkerJobRunStatus should throw BadRequestException if mapping does not exist

testcase.classname: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if stats is missing
testcase.name: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if stats is missing

testcase.classname: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if healthStatus is missing
testcase.name: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if healthStatus is missing

testcase.classname: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if healthStatus is not Healthy
testcase.name: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if healthStatus is not Healthy

testcase.classname: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if updatedAt is older than timeout
testcase.name: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Offline if updatedAt is older than timeout

testcase.classname: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Online if healthStatus is Healthy and updatedAt is recent
testcase.name: WorkersService updateWorkerStatus should set status to Online if healthStatus is Healthy and updatedAt is recent

testcase.classname: HealthcheckService should update stats if worker and stats exist

testcase.name: HealthcheckService should create stats if worker exists but stats do not

testcase.classname: HealthcheckService should throw an error if worker does not exist
testcase.name: HealthcheckService should throw an error if worker does not exist

testcase.classname: PreCheckService getLatestDiscoveryInventorySize should return -1 for invalid UUID
testcase.name: PreCheckService getLatestDiscoveryInventorySize should return -1 for invalid UUID

testcase.classname: PreCheckService getLatestDiscoveryInventorySize should return -1 when no discovery job run found
testcase.name: PreCheckService getLatestDiscoveryInventorySize should return -1 when no discovery job run found

testcase.classname: PreCheckService getLatestDiscoveryInventorySize should return 0 when inventory totalSize is null or zero
testcase.name: PreCheckService getLatestDiscoveryInventorySize should return 0 when inventory totalSize is null or zero

testcase.classname: PreCheckService getLatestDiscoveryInventorySize should return parsed totalSize when present

testcase.classname: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return bytes for values less than 1024
testcase.name: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return bytes for values less than 1024

testcase.classname: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return kilobytes for values between 1024 and 1 MB

testcase.classname: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return megabytes for values between 1 MB and 1 GB
testcase.name: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return megabytes for values between 1 MB and 1 GB

testcase.classname: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return gigabytes for values between 1 GB and 1 TB
testcase.name: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return gigabytes for values between 1 GB and 1 TB

testcase.classname: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return terabytes for values between 1 TB and 1 PB

testcase.classname: JobRunService service.covertBytes should return petabytes for values greater than or equal to 1 PB

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return runDate if jobType is DISCOVER and runDate is in the future
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return runDate if jobType is DISCOVER and runDate is in the future

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is DISCOVER and runDate is not in the future
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is DISCOVER and runDate is not in the future

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is DISCOVER and runDate is null
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is DISCOVER and runDate is null

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return the next date parsed from the cron string if jobType is MIGRATE
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return the next date parsed from the cron string if jobType is MIGRATE

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is not DISCOVER and cron string is null
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is not DISCOVER and cron string is null

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is not DISCOVER and cron string is invalid
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is not DISCOVER and cron string is invalid

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return runDate if jobType is CUT_OVER and runDate is in the future
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return runDate if jobType is CUT_OVER and runDate is in the future

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is CUT_OVER and runDate is not in the future
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is CUT_OVER and runDate is not in the future

testcase.classname: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is CUT_OVER and runDate is null
testcase.name: nextDate nextDate should return null if jobType is CUT_OVER and runDate is null
